allow: Bash(node -e "const app = require\('./server/app'\); console.log\('Express app loaded OK. Type:', typeof app\); console.log\('Stack length:', app._router?.stack?.length || app.router?.stack?.length || 'unknown'\)")

Bash(node -e "const app = require\('./server/app'\); console.log\('Express app loaded OK. Type:', typeof app\); console.log\('Routes:', \(app._router?.stack || app.router?.stack || []\).filter\(l => l.route\).map\(l => l.route.path\).slice\(0, 10\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const handler = require\('./api/index'\); console.log\('Vercel handler loaded OK. Type:', typeof handler\)")

Bash(node -e "const { VISION_CHAIN, TEXT_CHAIN } = require\('./server/services/aiProviders'\); console.log\('Vision chain:', VISION_CHAIN.map\(p => p.name\).join\(' → '\)\); console.log\('Text chain:', TEXT_CHAIN.map\(p => p.name\).join\(' → '\)\)")
